heading: dateFacet Type Limitations
body:
The following limitations apply:

- You can't index a date field for faceting if it's inside an array or
  if it's inside a document in an array.

- MongoDB Search doesn't support date faceting over fields indexed as part of an
  `embeddedDocuments` field.

  > **Note:** To request this feature and provide your feedback, use the
  > MongoDB Feedback.
